description: A minimal 2D platformer using Macroquad with physics, jumping, and collision detection

files.README.md:
# {{project_name}}

{{description}}

## Features
- 2D platformer physics
- Gravity and jumping
- Collision detection
- Player controller

## Controls
- Left/Right Arrow: Move
- Space: Jump

## Running
```bash
cargo run
```

## Extension Points
- Add enemies
- Add collectibles
- Add level progression
- Add animations
